ques: When and where the most recent World Cup was held, and which team was the winner?
answer: The most recent completed FIFA World Cup was the 2022 FIFA World Cup, held in Qatar from 20 November to 18 December 2022. Argentina won it, defeating France in the final to claim their 3rd title. (The 2026 World Cup, co-hosted by Canada, Mexico, and the USA, is currently in progress and has no winner yet.)
